stale_warning: Nightlights data is 17 days old (latest: 2026-04-24). NASA/satellite processing lag.
situation_brief: Riyadh nighttime radiance has collapsed 81% from pre-war baseline, consistent with widespread power grid failure. Strait of Hormuz commercial shipping at 36 vessels/day (-74% vs pre-war baseline of 138). 3 facilities sustained strike damage, including Jubail Desal.
